description: A customer is moving into a new apartment and needs to start electric service in their name.

nodes.task_description: Verify the service address and check if any previous balance is due at that location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the address is serviceable and has no outstanding balance.

nodes.task_description: Collect customer information and create a new account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new customer account in the system.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a service start date and explain the initial deposit requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules the service activation and clearly communicates any required deposit.
